paraphrase.headline: Qatar Airways to Resume Flights to Helsinki and Tokyo Haneda from July 15
paraphrase.body: Qatar Airways has announced the resumption of flights to Helsinki and Tokyo Haneda, effective 15 July, according to a statement from the airline. The move was praised by HH Sheikh Tamim bin Hamad Al Thani. The carrier will operate four weekly flights to Helsinki, increasing to daily from 1 August, and four weekly flights to Tokyo Haneda from 15 July. This expansion brings the airline's network to over 160 destinations, officials highlighted.
key_facts: Flights to Helsinki and Tokyo Haneda resume from 15 July.
Four weekly flights to Helsinki, increasing to daily from 1 August.
Four weekly flights to Tokyo Haneda from 15 July.

Added key facts bullet list with dates and numbers.
